paper.title: An Attention-Enhanced Φ-OTDR Event Recognition Framework for Edge-Based Distributed Acoustic Sensing
paper.abstract: Phase-sensitive optical time-domain reflectometry Φ-OTDR has emerged as a promising sensing technology in Internet of Things (IoT) infrastructures, enabling large-scale distributed acoustic sensing (DAS) for real-time monitoring at the edge in smart cities, industrial pipelines, and critical infrastructures. However, accurately recognizing events from massive Φ-OTDR data streams remains challenging, as existing deep learning methods either disrupt the inherent spatiotemporal structure of signals

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
